gate_reason: The agent stated a specific rupee amount before confirming they were speaking to the right person.

worst_messages.speaker: agent
worst_messages.text: Suresh Rao, I'm calling about your DemoLender education loan. We're showing a pending amount of fifty thousand rupees. Can you tell me a little about why you haven't been able to make the payments?
worst_messages.reason: phase_discipline: TOS amount disclosed before borrower identity confirmed

worst_messages.speaker: agent
worst_messages.text: Okay, I understand. It seems I have reached the wrong person. I will go ahead and end this call.
worst_messages.reason: policy_compliance: Agent disclosed amount to wrong person

reasons: empathy_tone: Agent did not handle wrong number with empathy.
phase_discipline: TOS amount disclosed before borrower identity confirmed.
negotiation_quality: No negotiation possible due to wrong number.
policy_compliance: Agent disclosed amount to wrong person.
resolution_effectiveness: Call ended abruptly after wrong number was identified.
summary: The agent called the wrong number and disclosed the loan amount before verifying the borrower's identity. This resulted in a policy violation and a failure to handle the situation effectively.
